system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'

{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: Q2O — QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO conversion to PO + qty revision questions", "body": "Hello,

Thank you for sending PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001 against quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO. We have received the conversion request and the details below have been captured for processing:

- Quote: QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO
- Purchase Order: PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001
- Customer: Aurora Automotive
- Payment Terms: Net 45
- Ship To: Aurora Automotive — El Segundo Lab, attn: Engineering Receiving
- Line Item: KS-SCOPE — Qty 9 @ $11,800 (revised from 6 units at the approved discounted unit price)
- Order Total: $179,200.00
- Notes captured: SMU lead time 6 weeks ex-works; ECCN 3A292.b, COO US, HTS 9030.84.0000 for KS-SMU-989545; cost center 4421-EE-LAB to appear on the SOA.

This order is currently pending an internal review step before the sales order acknowledgment is issued. Once that review is complete, you will receive the SOA with confirmed line-level lead times and shipment details.

If any of the details above need adjustment, please reply to this email and we will update the record before release.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps"}

parsed.subject: Re: Q2O — QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO conversion to PO + qty revision questions
parsed.body:
Hello,

Thank you for sending PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001 against quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO. We have received the conversion request and the details below have been captured for processing:

- Quote: QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO
- Purchase Order: PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001
- Customer: Aurora Automotive
- Payment Terms: Net 45
- Ship To: Aurora Automotive — El Segundo Lab, attn: Engineering Receiving
- Line Item: KS-SCOPE — Qty 9 @ $11,800 (revised from 6 units at the approved discounted unit price)
- Order Total: $179,200.00
- Notes captured: SMU lead time 6 weeks ex-works; ECCN 3A292.b, COO US, HTS 9030.84.0000 for KS-SMU-989545; cost center 4421-EE-LAB to appear on the SOA.

This order is currently pending an internal review step before the sales order acknowledgment is issued. Once that review is complete, you will receive the SOA with confirmed line-level lead times and shipment details.

If any of the details above need adjustment, please reply to this email and we will update the record before release.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
